de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.help

Class HelpFacade

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.help.HelpFacade

  • public class HelpFacade
extends java.lang.Object
    A gate to the KeY documentation system.

    Provides the facility to open the documentation at press of F1. The opened page is determined context-sensitive by the current focused component and parent components. Specify the URL via .

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static KeyAction ACTION_OPEN_HELP 
      static java.lang.String HELP_BASE_URL
      The base url of the help system.

      System property key for setting the base url of the help system.

    • Method Detail

      • openHelp

        public static void openHelp()
        Opens the key documentation website in the default system browser.

      • openHelp

        public static void openHelp(java.lang.String path)
        Opens the specified sub page of the key documentation website in the default system browser.
        Parameters:
        path - a valid suffix to the current URI

      • openHelp

        public static void openHelp(java.awt.Component path)
        Tries to find the documentation of the given component and opens it.

        The documentation is determined by following the parents to the root and checking for HelpInfo on the classes.

        Parameters:
        path -

      • openHelpOfClass

        public static boolean openHelpOfClass(java.lang.Class<?> clazz)
        Opens documentation given for the given class.

        The class needs to be annotated with HelpInfo.

        Parameters:
        clazz - non-null class instance.

      • createHelpButton

        public static bibliothek.gui.dock.common.action.CAction createHelpButton(java.lang.String s)
        Creates a CButton, that can be add to dockables and opens the given help pages at HELP_BASE_URL
        Parameters:
        s - path to help page
        Returns:

      • createHelpAction

        public static KeyAction createHelpAction(java.lang.String path)
